# Probabilistic Roadmap

## Purpose

Sequence experiments by uncertainty and payoff.

## Roadmap score

```text
score =
expected_value
× probability_of_learning
× speed
÷ (cost × complexity × downside_risk)
```

## Order of attack

1. demand existence,
2. buyer-state diagnosis,
3. offer strength,
4. proof path,
5. conversion friction,
6. activation,
7. monetization,
8. scale.

## Agent rule

Never optimize microcopy before proving the buyer-state and offer.
